claim_boundary: admitted SQL local-source expression/operator correctness evidence only; not ANSI SQL, production semantic parity, or performance evidence
fallback_boundary: external engines may be isolated test oracles or baselines only and are not invoked by this validator
remaining_matrix_gaps: broad ANSI subquery parity beyond bounded local scalar IN-subquery, row-value IN-subquery, scoped EXISTS, and scoped quantified ANY/ALL fixtures
general fuzz execution beyond the deterministic seeded property lane

rows.null_policy: null_propagating_for_arithmetic_operands; null_amount_not_selected_by_predicate
rows.coercion_policy: integer arithmetic over admitted numeric columns and finite literals only
rows.invalid_input_behavior: invalid numeric expressions return deterministic unsupported diagnostics
rows.claim_boundary: seeded property lane for scoped SQL local-source numeric expression projections only

rows.null_policy: TRY_CAST returns NULL for invalid scalar values
rows.coercion_policy: explicit TRY_CAST(column AS int64) only; no silent lossy coercion
rows.invalid_input_behavior: invalid scalar input becomes NULL under TRY_CAST and strict CAST invalid inputs block
rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL local-source TRY_CAST projection only

rows.null_policy: string transforms and length preserve scalar-row NULL propagation where admitted
rows.coercion_policy: UTF-8 source columns only; non-UTF8 operands block deterministically
rows.invalid_input_behavior: missing or non-UTF8 string operands return deterministic unsupported diagnostics
rows.claim_boundary: scoped LOWER/UPPER/TRIM/LENGTH projection semantics only

rows.null_policy: SQL three-valued WHERE filtering; NULL input or pattern evaluates to NULL
rows.coercion_policy: scoped UTF-8 regex predicates compile Rust regex patterns and require UTF-8 string operands
rows.invalid_input_behavior: invalid regex patterns and non-UTF-8 operands block deterministically before fallback
rows.claim_boundary: scoped local-source UTF-8 RLIKE/REGEXP/REGEXP_LIKE predicate semantics only; no locale/collation or regex projection/function completeness claim

rows.null_policy: SQL three-valued WHERE filtering; NULL input or pattern evaluates to NULL
rows.coercion_policy: scoped UTF-8 LIKE predicates lower SQL % and _ wildcards to ShardLoom-owned string predicate kernels and require UTF-8 string operands
rows.invalid_input_behavior: non-UTF8 operands block deterministically before fallback; custom ESCAPE clauses, locale-aware collation, and case-folding semantics remain outside this claim
rows.claim_boundary: scoped local-source UTF-8 LIKE predicate semantics with % and _ wildcards only; no custom ESCAPE, locale/collation, or case-folding claim

rows.null_policy: temporal extract returns NULL for NULL temporal operands where admitted
rows.coercion_policy: explicit cast to date32/timestamp_micros plus scoped ISO UTC timestamp parsing
rows.invalid_input_behavior: invalid date/time literals and unsupported timestamp forms block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped Date32 and UTC timestamp extract projection semantics only

rows.null_policy: COALESCE uses matching non-null fallback; NULLIF returns NULL on matching sentinel
rows.coercion_policy: source/fallback and source/sentinel dtypes must match after binding
rows.invalid_input_behavior: mismatched fallback or sentinel dtype returns deterministic unsupported diagnostics
rows.claim_boundary: scoped COALESCE and NULLIF projection semantics only

rows.null_policy: SQL three-valued comparison projection plus IS NULL and IS NOT TRUE/FALSE behavior
rows.coercion_policy: admitted scalar comparisons over bound source columns and DATE literals only
rows.invalid_input_behavior: missing source columns and unsupported predicate shapes block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL predicate projection semantics only

rows.null_policy: HAVING evaluates SQL WHERE-style truth over aggregate output rows; non-true or NULL predicate results are filtered out
rows.coercion_policy: HAVING columns must bind to aggregate output aliases or selected group keys
rows.invalid_input_behavior: HAVING over non-aggregate rows or non-output source columns returns deterministic unsupported diagnostics
rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL local-source aggregate HAVING over emitted aggregate output rows only

rows.null_policy: composed UTF-8 string functions propagate NULL operands where admitted
rows.coercion_policy: UTF-8 source columns and scalar UTF-8/int literals only
rows.invalid_input_behavior: unsupported string function shapes return deterministic diagnostics
rows.claim_boundary: scoped CONCAT/SUBSTR/LEFT/RIGHT/REPLACE SQL local-source semantics only

rows.null_policy: temporal arithmetic and differences propagate NULL temporal operands
rows.coercion_policy: explicit casts plus scoped ISO Date32 and UTC timestamp_micros parsing only
rows.invalid_input_behavior: invalid dates, non-UTC timestamps, and out-of-range intervals block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped UTC date/timestamp arithmetic and difference projections only

rows.null_policy: CASE predicates use SQL truth where NULL selects ELSE
rows.coercion_policy: THEN and ELSE branch dtypes must match after source-column binding
rows.invalid_input_behavior: mixed branch dtypes and unsupported predicate leaves block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped CASE WHEN computed projection semantics only

rows.null_policy: IN lists containing NULL use SQL three-valued WHERE filtering
rows.coercion_policy: literal list values must match the source column dtype or NULL
rows.invalid_input_behavior: empty lists, dangling commas, and oversized lists block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped literal IN predicate NULL semantics only

rows.null_policy: sql_row_value_three_valued_where_filter
rows.coercion_policy: literal tuple arity must match the source column count; DATE/TIMESTAMP tuple positions must stay type-homogeneous except NULL
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback for malformed row tuples
rows.claim_boundary: scoped local-source row-value literal IN predicate semantics only

rows.null_policy: materialized row-value IN subquery tuples containing NULL use SQL three-valued WHERE filtering
rows.coercion_policy: selected subquery tuple arity must match the left row-value arity; WHERE/ORDER/LIMIT clauses are bounded and local
rows.invalid_input_behavior: scalar multi-column, arity-mismatched, nested, joined, grouped, or correlated subquery shapes block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped bounded local row-value IN subquery predicate semantics only

rows.null_policy: EXISTS uses a two-valued presence test over the bounded subquery output; NULL payload values do not make the presence test unknown
rows.coercion_policy: EXISTS projection may be *, a scalar literal, or a plain local column list; WHERE/ORDER/LIMIT clauses are bounded and local
rows.invalid_input_behavior: nested, joined, grouped, HAVING-internal, or correlated subquery shapes block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped uncorrelated local-source EXISTS subquery predicate semantics only

rows.null_policy: materialized ANY/ALL subquery values use SQL three-valued WHERE filtering; empty ANY is false and empty ALL is true
rows.coercion_policy: left operand and single selected subquery column must be scalar comparable; WHERE/ORDER/LIMIT clauses are bounded and local
rows.invalid_input_behavior: nested, joined, grouped, correlated, scalar-left multi-column, or malformed quantified subquery shapes block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped bounded local quantified ANY/ALL subquery predicate semantics only

rows.null_policy: UNION DISTINCT groups NULL row values; UNION ALL preserves branch rows
rows.coercion_policy: branch output columns and non-null dtypes must match; implicit UNION dtype coercion is not admitted
rows.invalid_input_behavior: branch-local ORDER BY/LIMIT, mixed UNION modes, branch shape mismatch, dtype mismatch, and branch bound saturation block deterministically before fallback
rows.claim_boundary: scoped local-source SQL UNION and UNION ALL composition over already-admitted branch SELECTs only

rows.null_policy: materialized IN subquery values containing NULL use SQL three-valued WHERE filtering
rows.coercion_policy: single-column scalar subquery values must match the left operand dtype
rows.invalid_input_behavior: missing subquery columns and oversized materialized lists block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped scalar IN subquery predicate semantics only

rows.null_policy: filtered bounded IN subquery values without NULL use ordinary scalar membership semantics
rows.coercion_policy: single-column scalar subquery values must match the left operand dtype; WHERE/ORDER/LIMIT clauses are bounded and local
rows.invalid_input_behavior: unsupported scalar multi-column, correlated, joined, grouped, or nested subquery shapes block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped filtered, ordered, limited local scalar IN subquery predicate semantics only

rows.null_policy: HAVING evaluates the materialized scalar subquery set over aggregate output rows and filters non-true results
rows.coercion_policy: HAVING left operand must bind to an aggregate output alias or selected group key and match the scalar subquery dtype
rows.invalid_input_behavior: unsupported HAVING subquery shapes block deterministically before fallback
rows.claim_boundary: scoped aggregate HAVING over bounded local scalar IN subqueries only

rows.null_policy: COUNT(DISTINCT column) ignores NULL values while count(*) includes rows
rows.coercion_policy: COUNT(DISTINCT <column>) only; other DISTINCT aggregate functions are unsupported
rows.invalid_input_behavior: unsupported DISTINCT aggregate shapes block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped grouped COUNT(DISTINCT) aggregate semantics only

rows.null_policy: row-level SELECT DISTINCT groups duplicate NULL values together before LIMIT
rows.coercion_policy: DISTINCT compares projected scalar values after existing projection expression evaluation
rows.invalid_input_behavior: non-admitted DISTINCT expressions, non-output ORDER BY keys, and broader arbitrary SQL DISTINCT shapes block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped row-level SELECT DISTINCT projection semantics over bounded local-source output rows only

rows.null_policy: row-level SELECT DISTINCT groups duplicate aggregate output rows together before LIMIT
rows.coercion_policy: DISTINCT compares aggregate output scalar values after HAVING evaluation
rows.invalid_input_behavior: non-admitted aggregate, HAVING, or output expression shapes block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped row-level SELECT DISTINCT over admitted aggregate/HAVING output rows only

rows.null_policy: hidden HAVING aggregates evaluate over aggregate rows and filter non-true predicates
rows.coercion_policy: HAVING aggregate functions must be admitted aggregate functions over grouped source rows
rows.invalid_input_behavior: unsupported HAVING aggregate shapes block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped hidden aggregate functions in HAVING expressions only

rows.null_policy: window offset functions produce NULL when the requested peer row is absent
rows.coercion_policy: scoped partition/order columns and positive NTILE/LAG offsets only
rows.invalid_input_behavior: unsupported window frames, zero offsets, and invalid bucket counts block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped mixed window row_number/rank/lag/ntile semantics only

rows.null_policy: row-level SELECT DISTINCT groups duplicate window output rows together before LIMIT
rows.coercion_policy: DISTINCT compares window output scalar values after admitted window evaluation
rows.invalid_input_behavior: unsupported window functions, frames, and top-level post-window ORDER BY block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped row-level SELECT DISTINCT over admitted window output rows only

rows.null_policy: inner equi joins emit matched non-null key rows only for this scoped fixture
rows.coercion_policy: qualified same-dtype equi join keys plus admitted WHERE predicate leaves only
rows.invalid_input_behavior: ambiguous aliases, duplicate-key explosions, and unsupported ON shapes block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped multi-key inner equi join plus WHERE predicate semantics only

rows.null_policy: row-level SELECT DISTINCT groups duplicate join output rows together before LIMIT
rows.coercion_policy: DISTINCT compares projected join output scalar values after admitted join matching and filtering
rows.invalid_input_behavior: ambiguous aliases, duplicate-key explosions beyond scoped caps, unsupported joins, and non-output ORDER BY keys block deterministically
rows.claim_boundary: scoped row-level SELECT DISTINCT over admitted join output rows only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: division by zero is not admitted
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: numeric arithmetic projection division by zero is not admitted
rows.claim_boundary: blocked unsupported numeric arithmetic shape only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: decimal128 cast target is not admitted
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: decimal precision/scale casts are not admitted by the current scalar semantics profile
rows.claim_boundary: blocked unsupported cast target only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: UTC timestamp_micros literals only
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.claim_boundary: blocked non-UTC/offset timestamp literal only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: timezone database conversion is not admitted
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: timezone database and non-UTC timestamp semantics are not admitted
rows.claim_boundary: blocked timezone database conversion only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: ANSI interval literals are not admitted
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: ANSI INTERVAL literals and interval arithmetic are not admitted
rows.claim_boundary: blocked interval literal/arithmetic only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: locale-aware collation is not admitted
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: SQL COLLATE and locale-aware collation semantics are not admitted
rows.claim_boundary: blocked locale/collation comparison only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: list and array value construction is not admitted
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: list and array literals, accessors, and equality semantics are not admitted by the current complex dtype profile
rows.claim_boundary: blocked list/array source literal, accessor, and equality semantics only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: struct and row value construction is not admitted
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: struct and row constructor equality/access semantics are not admitted by the current complex dtype profile
rows.claim_boundary: blocked struct/row construction, equality, access, and field-identity semantics only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: variant tags and projections are not admitted
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: variant access semantics are not admitted by the current complex dtype profile
rows.claim_boundary: blocked variant access semantics only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: union dtype casts and union-typed scalar values are not admitted
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: union dtype casts are not admitted by the current complex dtype profile
rows.claim_boundary: blocked union dtype scalar semantics only; SQL UNION composition is tracked separately as an executable row

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: binary scalar equality is admitted, but SQL binary literals and source decoding are not admitted
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: binary source literals and binary input decoding are not admitted through the SQL local-source runtime
rows.claim_boundary: blocked binary SQL source literal and input decode semantics only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: scalar IN subqueries must project exactly one source column; multi-column subqueries require row-value left operands
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: multi-column IN subqueries require row-value source columns
rows.claim_boundary: blocked scalar-left multi-column IN-subquery projection shape only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: nested IN subqueries are not admitted
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: nested IN subqueries are not admitted by the current advanced predicate profile
rows.claim_boundary: blocked nested IN-subquery shape only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: joined IN subqueries must be materialized explicitly before this runtime path
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: joined IN subqueries are not admitted by the current advanced predicate profile; materialize the joined source explicitly before this scoped runtime path
rows.claim_boundary: blocked joined IN-subquery shape only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: IN subqueries admit bounded scalar projection/filter/order/limit only, not grouped internals
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: grouped and HAVING subqueries are not admitted by the current advanced predicate profile; only bounded scalar projection subqueries are admitted
rows.claim_boundary: blocked grouped or HAVING-internal IN-subquery shape only

rows.null_policy: not_applicable_blocked_before_execution
rows.coercion_policy: correlated or qualified IN subquery predicate references are not admitted
rows.invalid_input_behavior: deterministic unsupported diagnostic before fallback
rows.unsupported_diagnostic_message: correlated or qualified IN subquery predicates are not admitted by the current advanced predicate profile
rows.claim_boundary: blocked correlated IN-subquery predicate shape only
